svg.title: SentinelEdgeAI Build Roadmap — 7 phases from hardware setup to optimization
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing 7 build phases for SentinelEdgeAI, each with sub-components and time estimates.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 1: Network Monitoring on Raspberry Pi')
g.text: Raspberry Pi 5 · Zeek/Suricata · packet capture · feature extraction · flow parsing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 2: Secure Data Pipeline between Pi and Jetson')
g.text: JSON schema · MQTT/gRPC · TLS encryption · Pi → Jetson feature transfer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 3: AI Engine on Jetson Orin Nano')
g.text: Isolation Forest · baseline training · real-time inference · Jetson GPU acceleration

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 4: Risk Scoring and Decision Engine')
g.text: Risk score 0–100 · log / alert / block / isolate logic · threshold tuning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 5: Adaptive Firewall and Device Isolation')
g.text: iptables/nftables · dynamic rule injection · VLAN isolation · device quarantine

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 6: SOC Dashboard with FastAPI and React')
g.text: FastAPI REST · WebSocket alerts · React UI · threat timeline · live metrics

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me full step-by-step instructions for SentinelEdgeAI Phase 7: Optimization, latency reduction and accuracy tuning')
g.text: Latency tuning · false positive reduction · model retraining · throughput benchmarks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how to implement a Reinforcement Learning firewall for SentinelEdgeAI')
sendPrompt('Explain multi-node distributed deployment for SentinelEdgeAI')
sendPrompt('Explain Autonomous Threat Response and LSTM sequence modeling for SentinelEdgeAI')

svg.text: Click any phase to start building it
